---
title: "Coste-eficacia de PrEP en España"
author: "Philip Wikman"
date: "15 de mayo de 2019"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Core packages
library(lhs)
library(parallel)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
source("HIVSIM02exp05.R")
source("invbeta_u.R")
source("invgamma_u.R")
source("rdirichlet_u.R")
source("draw_params_from_u.R")
source("sim_weekly_to_yearly.R")
source("HIVSIMCAL_LCA_LHS.R")
source("make_slices_HIVSIM.R")
source("rs_at.R")

set.seed(123)
years<-5
m<-read.csv("MortPobGen.csv", header=TRUE, sep=";")
DistEdad<-vector(length=85)
DistEdad[1:10]<-0.114106384/10
DistEdad[11:20]<-0.116645332/10
DistEdad[21:30]<-0.281029342/10
DistEdad[31:40]<-0.30552628/10
DistEdad[41:50]<-0.112127906/10
DistEdad[51:85]<-0.070564755/35
RiskRed<-1-0.86

obs_year <- data.frame(
   Year = 1:5,
   NewAIDS_obs    = c(196,161,141,136,101),
   AIDSdeaths_obs = c(342,334,293,235,240)*0.26,  #0.26 proportion in Jarrin AIDS 2024. 531,513,385,342,
   NewInf_obs     = c(2406,1713,1741,1810,1757)*1.075# Asumo que la fracción no diagnosticada es del 7.5%, por lo que a los nuevos diagnósticos los incremento un 7.5%. Fuente Informe VIH 2023. 2348,2604 (2013 y 2014) 2457,2529,2532,2431,
)
```

 
```{r}
load("ResultParam")

# ResultParam: list of length 20 from your cluster run
# Each ResultParam[[i]] is list(R_block, Params_block)

traj_blocks  <- lapply(ResultParam, `[[`, 1L)   # list of lists of data.frames
all_trajs    <- unlist(traj_blocks, recursive = FALSE)

param_blocks <- lapply(ResultParam, `[[`, 2L)   # each 32 x repeats
Params_all   <- do.call(cbind, param_blocks)   # 32 x N_runs
N_runs <- length(all_trajs)
dim(Params_all)  # 32 x N_runs
```

```{r}

rmse_newAIDS   <- numeric(N_runs)
rmse_AIDSdeath <- numeric(N_runs)
rmse_newInf    <- numeric(N_runs)

for (i in seq_len(N_runs)) {
  sim_week <- all_trajs[[i]]                             # weekly simulation
  sim_year <- sim_weekly_to_yearly(sim_week, years = years, weeks_per_year = 52L)
  
  df <- merge(
    obs_year,
    sim_year,
    by = "Year",
    all = FALSE
  )
  
 e1 <- (df$NewAIDS_sim    - df$NewAIDS_obs)    / mean(df$NewAIDS_obs)
 e2 <- (df$AIDSdeaths_sim - df$AIDSdeaths_obs) / mean(df$AIDSdeaths_obs)
e3 <- (df$NewInf_sim     - df$NewInf_obs)     / mean(df$NewInf_obs)
  
  rmse_newAIDS[i]   <- sqrt(mean(e1^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  rmse_AIDSdeath[i] <- sqrt(mean(e2^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  rmse_newInf[i]    <- sqrt(mean(e3^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

rmse_max <- pmax(rmse_newAIDS, rmse_AIDSdeath, rmse_newInf)

best_idx_global <- which.min(rmse_max)

best_idx_global
rmse_max[best_idx_global]
c(
  NewAIDS   = rmse_newAIDS[best_idx_global],
  AIDSdeath = rmse_AIDSdeath[best_idx_global],
  NewInf    = rmse_newInf[best_idx_global]
)

best_params_global <- Params_all[, best_idx_global]
best_params_global


```
```{r}
## ----local_optim_helpers, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE------------------------

simulate_weekly_from_theta <- function(theta, m, DistEdad, RiskRed) {
  Age   <- 85L
  NoSem <- 52L
  years_local <- years   # use the global 'years' you defined (5)
  
  # Unpack theta following your Params_all row convention
  NumHSHVIH <- theta[1]
  NumHSH    <- 892955 - NumHSHVIH
  
  ACD4      <- theta[2]
  I7CD4     <- theta[3]
  Rest      <- theta[4]
  
  PropTR    <- theta[5]
  G         <- theta[6]
  Woff      <- 0.0038 #Proportion of people who go off PrEP. SiPrEP 15% anual, p=1-e^-rt
  W<-0.00192    #Proportion of people who go on PrEP. SiPrEP describe 5000-7000 nuevos anuales y eso supone una probabilidad alrededor de 0.1 anual.

  mVIH235   <- theta[7]
  mVIH35    <- theta[8]
  mAIDS     <- theta[9]
  
  Cvh       <- theta[10]
  Ch        <- theta[11]
  Cl        <- theta[12]
  Cvl       <- theta[13]
  
  nvh       <- theta[14]
  nh        <- theta[15]
  nl        <- theta[16]
  nvl       <- theta[17]
  
  B         <- theta[18]
  I12       <- theta[19]
  I23       <- theta[20]
  I34       <- theta[21]
  I45       <- theta[22]
  I56       <- theta[23]
  I67       <- theta[24]
  I78       <- theta[25]
  
  PTr       <- theta[26:28]
  
  # Run the model
  Q <- HIVSIM(
    Age, NoSem, NumHSH, NumHSHVIH,
    ACD4, I7CD4, Rest,
    G, Woff, W,
    m, mVIH235, mVIH35, mAIDS,
    Cvh, Ch, Cl, Cvl,
    nvh, nh, nl, nvl, B,
    I12, I23, I34,
    I45,
    I56, I67,
    I78, PTr, years_local, PropTR,
    DistEdad, RiskRed
  )
  
  Slices <- make_slices_HIVSIM(Age)
  
  QQ <- array(
    as.numeric(unlist(lapply(Q, as.matrix))),
    dim = c(52L, Slices$ncol_expected, years_local)
  )
  
  nrows <- years_local * 52L
  Qmat  <- matrix(0, nrow = nrows, ncol = 19L)
  colnames(Qmat) <- c(
    "Weeks", "Susceptible", "Inf1", "Inf2", "Inf3", "Inf4",
    "Inf5", "Inf6", "Inf7", "AIDS", "Treated", "Dead", "NewAIDS",
    "Lvh", "Lh", "Ll", "Lvl", "New_HIV_inf", "New_HIV_treatments"
  )
  
  r0 <- 0L
  for (t in seq_len(years_local)) {
    rr <- r0 + seq_len(52L)
    Qmat[rr, 1L]  <- rr
    Qmat[rr, 2L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$S0,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 3L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I1,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 4L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I2,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 5L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I3,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 6L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I4,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 7L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I5,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 8L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I6,   t)
    Qmat[rr, 9L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$I7,   t)
    Qmat[rr,10L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$AIDS, t)
    
    Qmat[rr,11L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$Treated, t)
    Qmat[rr,12L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$Dead,    t)
    Qmat[rr,13L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$NewAIDS, t)
    
    Qmat[rr,14L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$FI_vh, t)
    Qmat[rr,15L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$FI_h,  t)
    Qmat[rr,16L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$FI_l,  t)
    Qmat[rr,17L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$FI_vl, t)
    
    Qmat[rr,18L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$NewHIV,        t)
    Qmat[rr,19L]  <- rs_at(QQ, Slices$NewTreatments, t)
    r0 <- r0 + 52L
  }
  
  as.data.frame(Qmat, check.names = FALSE)
}

```
```{r}
## ----objective_fn, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE-------------------------------

objective_theta <- function(theta, m, DistEdad, RiskRed, obs_year) {

  
  # Wrap everything in a tryCatch so errors become a large penalty
  res <- tryCatch({
    
    sim_week <- simulate_weekly_from_theta(theta, m, DistEdad, RiskRed)
    
    # If weekly simulation is crazy, penalise
    if (any(!is.finite(unlist(sim_week)))) {
      return(1e15)
    }
    
    sim_year <- sim_weekly_to_yearly(sim_week, years = years, weeks_per_year = 52L)
    
    if (any(!is.finite(unlist(sim_year)))) {
      return(1e16)
    }
    
    df <- merge(
      obs_year,
      sim_year,
      by = "Year",
      all = FALSE
    )
    
    # No overlapping years → nothing to compare → penalise
    if (nrow(df) == 0L) {
      return(1e17)
    }
    
    # NORMALIZED errors (percentage-based)
    e1 <- (df$NewAIDS_sim    - df$NewAIDS_obs)    / mean(df$NewAIDS_obs)
    e2 <- (df$AIDSdeaths_sim - df$AIDSdeaths_obs) / mean(df$AIDSdeaths_obs)
    e3 <- (df$NewInf_sim     - df$NewInf_obs)     / mean(df$NewInf_obs)

    
    # If all NA in any outcome, mean(..., na.rm=TRUE) becomes NaN → penalise
    if (all(is.na(e1)) || all(is.na(e2)) || all(is.na(e3))) {
      return(1e18)
    }
    
    rmse_newAIDS   <- sqrt(mean(e1^2, na.rm = TRUE))
    rmse_AIDSdeath <- sqrt(mean(e2^2, na.rm = TRUE))
    rmse_newInf    <- sqrt(mean(e3^2, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    rmses <- c(rmse_newAIDS, rmse_AIDSdeath, rmse_newInf)
    
    # If any RMSE is non-finite, penalise
    if (!all(is.finite(rmses))) {
      return(1e19)
    }
    
    val <- max(rmses)
    
    # Final safety check
    if (!is.finite(val) || length(val) != 1L) {
      return(1e20)
    }
    
    val
  },
  error = function(e) {
    # Any error in the simulation/objective → large penalty
    1e21
  })
  
  res
}
```

```{r}
## ----local_optim_run, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE----------------------------

# Order runs by global minimax RMSE
order_best <- order(rmse_max)

K_start <- min(10, N_runs)   # use up to 5 best LHS runs (or fewer if N_runs < 5)
start_indices <- order_best[seq_len(K_start)]

# Bounds for each parameter from LHS distribution (1% and 99% quantiles)
lower_bounds <- apply(Params_all, 1, quantile, probs = 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)
upper_bounds <- apply(Params_all, 1, quantile, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)


run_one_optim <- function(idx0,
                          Params_all,
                          lower_bounds,
                          upper_bounds,
                          m,
                          DistEdad,
                          RiskRed,
                          obs_year) {
  theta0 <- Params_all[, idx0]
  theta0 <- pmin(pmax(theta0, lower_bounds), upper_bounds)  # enforce bounds
  cat("Worker starting local search from LHS run", idx0, "\n")
  
  optim(
    par    = theta0,
    fn     = objective_theta,
    method = "L-BFGS-B",
    lower  = lower_bounds,
    upper  = upper_bounds,
    m      = m,
    DistEdad = DistEdad,
    RiskRed  = RiskRed,
    obs_year = obs_year,
    control  = list(maxit = 10, factr = 1e7, trace = 0)
  )
}

cl_opt <- makePSOCKcluster(10)

# FIX 1: Load libraries on workers
clusterEvalQ(cl_opt, {
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
})

# FIX 2: Source all files on workers
clusterEvalQ(cl_opt, {
  source("HIVSIM02exp05.R")
  source("sim_weekly_to_yearly.R")
  source("make_slices_HIVSIM.R")
  source("rs_at.R")
})

# FIX 3: Export everything
clusterExport(cl_opt, c(
  "objective_theta",
  "simulate_weekly_from_theta",
  "Params_all",
  "lower_bounds",
  "upper_bounds",
  "m", "DistEdad", "RiskRed", "obs_year",
  "years"
))

# FIX 4: Verify workers can run the objective
clusterEvalQ(cl_opt, {
  test <- objective_theta(Params_all[,1], m, DistEdad, RiskRed, obs_year)
  cat("Worker test:", test, "\n")
})

clusterSetRNGStream(cl_opt, 123)

opt_results <- parLapply(
  cl_opt,
  X = start_indices,
  fun = run_one_optim,
  Params_all  = Params_all,
  lower_bounds = lower_bounds,
  upper_bounds = upper_bounds,
  m         = m,
  DistEdad  = DistEdad,
  RiskRed   = RiskRed,
  obs_year  = obs_year
)

stopCluster(cl_opt)

# Extract results
final_vals   <- sapply(opt_results, `[[`, "value")
best_loc_idx <- which.min(final_vals)

best_local <- opt_results[[best_loc_idx]]
best_theta <- best_local$par
best_value <- best_local$value

best_value
```
```{r}
## ----plot_best_local, fig.height=6, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE-------------

best_sim_week <- simulate_weekly_from_theta(best_theta, m, DistEdad, RiskRed)
best_sim_year <- sim_weekly_to_yearly(best_sim_week, years = years, weeks_per_year = 52L)

plot_df <- obs_year %>%
  inner_join(best_sim_year, by = "Year") %>%
  transmute(
    Year,
    NewAIDS_obs,
    NewAIDS_sim,
    AIDSdeaths_obs,
    AIDSdeaths_sim,
    NewInf_obs,
    NewInf_sim
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Year,
    names_to = c("outcome", "type"),
    names_pattern = "(.*)_(obs|sim)$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = dplyr::case_when(
      outcome == "NewAIDS"    ~ "New AIDS cases",
      #outcome == "AIDSdeaths" ~ "AIDS deaths",
      outcome == "NewInf"     ~ "New HIV infections",
      TRUE                    ~ outcome
    ),
    type = ifelse(type == "obs", "Observed", "Simulated")
  )

limits_df <- data.frame(
  outcome = c("New AIDS cases", "New AIDS cases", "New HIV infections", "New HIV infections"),
  value   = c(0, 500, 0, 3000),
  Year    = min(plot_df$Year),
  type    = "Observed"
)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Year, y = value, colour = type)) +
  geom_blank(data = limits_df) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, scales="free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = 2019:2023) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Annual count",
    colour = "",
    title = "Observed vs simulated (yearly) after local optimization"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
save(best_theta, file="Best_theta_Param")
```
